/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -g -shared  -o libkdenotify.so CMakeFiles/kdenotify.dir/kdenotify_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kdenotify.dir/kdenotify.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kdenotify.dir/kdenotifyfactory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kdenotify.dir/kdenotifysettingsdialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kdenotify.dir/kdenotify_autogen/YTRUC5LEIS/qrc_translations.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/lixiang/Qt/6.5.3/gcc_64/lib:/home/lixiang/Downloads/qmmp-2.3.1/build-linux/src/qmmpui:/home/lixiang/Downloads/qmmp-2.3.1/build-linux/src/qmmp: /home/lixiang/Qt/6.5.3/gcc_64/lib/libQt6DBus.so.6.5.3 ../../../qmmpui/libqmmpui.so.2.3.1 ../../../qmmp/libqmmp.so.2.3.1 /home/lixiang/Qt/6.5.3/gcc_64/lib/libQt6Widgets.so.6.5.3 /home/lixiang/Qt/6.5.3/gcc_64/lib/libQt6Gui.so.6.5.3 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so /home/lixiang/Qt/6.5.3/gcc_64/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.5.3 -pthread -Wl,-rpath-link,/home/lixiang/Qt/6.5.3/gcc_64/lib
